title: BC-05 — Audit
description: Data contract for the Audit Bounded Context. Defines AuditEvent aggregate for cross-cutting audit logging. Captures security events (HIGH), domain mutations (STANDARD), and optional read operations (LOW). Supports multi-tenant filtering via graduateProgramId.

AuditEvent.description: Aggregate Root. Records a system event for compliance and traceability. Captures actor, action, target entity, severity, and context. Conformist (R3) to BC-06 for actor identity, Conformist (R4) to BC-04 for program scope.

actorId.description: userId from BC-06 Identity & Access. References the user who triggered the action.

actorRole.description: Role of the actor at the time of the event.

entityType.description: Type of the affected entity. E.g. 'User', 'Student', 'Enrollment'.

details.description: Additional context. JSON-encoded extra data for detailed audit trail.

ipAddress.description: IP address of the request origin. IPv4 or IPv6.

graduateProgramId.description: Multi-tenant scope from BC-04. Enables per-program audit filtering.

AuditSeverity.description: Value Object indicating audit event importance.

AuditSeverityLevel.description: HIGH: security events (login, RBAC violations, password changes). STANDARD: domain mutations (entity CRUD). LOW: read operations (configurable per environment).

KnownAuditActions.description: Well-known audit actions emitted by other Bounded Contexts. Documented for traceability.

AuditEventResponse.description: Read model for querying audit events.
